Join Our Team

Build a Rewarding Career at CCS

At Catholic Crosscultural Services (CCS), we are passionate about helping newcomers thrive. Our team is made up of dedicated, compassionate individuals who work together to support our community and make a real impact in the lives of others.

We believe that great work begins with great people. That’s why we’re committed to creating a positive, supportive workplace where employees can grow, learn, and feel valued. Whether you’re supporting newcomers, collaborating with your colleagues, or celebrating achievements, you’ll be doing meaningful work that truly makes a difference.

We are Hiring! 

We are a value-driven organization, and our team takes pride in contributing to the growth of a stronger, more inclusive community. We’re always looking for passionate individuals who want to use their skills and expertise to support our mission and make a meaningful difference.

View all current job opportunities here: https://ccs.sutihr.com/jobs 

Our Core Competencies

We wouldn’t be who we are without living and breathing a set of common core competencies. These guide everything we do: 

Client Centric
Team Work
Communication
Problem Solving & Decision Making
Planning and Organizing
Execution
Integrity & Accountability
Resilience & Adaptability
Continuous Improvement
Strategic Thinking
Read our Mission & Values
